commands.name: agent start
commands.summary: Start a local direct-write agent lease, optionally using a work view or remote host.

options.name: --base
options.summary: Lease base, such as latest-workspace or latest:main.

options.name: --work-view
options.summary: Write through an isolated work view.

options.name: --force-stale
options.summary: Start anyway when the local freshness guardian sees a stale base.

options.name: --on
options.summary: Dispatch the lease to an authorized device; unknown hosts use remote bootstrap.

options.name: --remote
options.summary: Mint a lease-scoped bootstrap token for an outbound agent runtime.

options.name: --remote-root
options.summary: Remote workspace root for the outbound runtime.

options.name: --json
options.summary: Return the command contract JSON on stdout.

options.name: --dry-run
options.summary: Preview the mutation without changing local or daemon state.
